# Story 6 — Add Security

**As a developer**  
I need to secure the microservice  
So that it is protected from vulnerabilities

## Details

- Add Flask-Talisman for security headers
- Add Flask-CORS for cross-origin requests

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Given the service is running
- [ ] When I access endpoints
- [ ] Then security headers should be present

- [ ] Given cross-origin requests
- [ ] When requests are made
- [ ] Then they should follow CORS policy
